prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical outdoor portrait of a beautiful young East Asian woman sitting on a wooden park bench in a lush green park during warm late-afternoon sunlight. She has long straight black hair with soft bangs and a small hair clip on one side, clear fair skin, natural makeup, and a gentle shy smile while looking slightly off-camera. She wears a fitted white off-shoulder lace mini dress with short lace sleeves, a corset-style lace-up front with thin ribbons, delicate floral lace texture, and a scalloped lace hem. Pose her seated sideways on the bench with both hands resting neatly on her knees, relaxed shoulders, elegant posture, and legs angled toward the foreground. The setting includes exactly 1 wooden bench, 1 paved green walking path curving into the background, 1 green trash bin, 1 wooden park signpost with small unreadable signs, several distant pedestrians softly out of focus, dense trees and bushes, dappled shadows, and golden sunlight filtering through leaves. Use a realistic smartphone photo aesthetic, natural skin texture, shallow depth of field, crisp subject focus, soft background bokeh, 3/4 portrait framing from knees to head, vertical 4:5 composition, no visible watermark, no added text, and no exaggerated fantasy styling.
